scripts.eyeball: for f in scripts/eyeball-*.cjs; do echo "--- $f ---"; node "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.eyeball:pdp: for f in pdp-thumbs pdp-swatches pdp-sizestock pdp-magnify pdp-360-partial; do echo "--- eyeball-$f ---"; node "scripts/eyeball-$f.cjs" || exit 1; done
scripts.eyeball:mobile: for f in mobile-zoom mobile-pan mobile-scroll mobile-pinch-hint; do echo "--- eyeball-$f ---"; node "scripts/eyeball-$f.cjs" || exit 1; done
scripts.eyeball:misc: for f in 360-counter cart multi; do echo "--- eyeball-$f ---"; node "scripts/eyeball-$f.cjs" || exit 1; done
